text.title: Notion PM Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Notion PM end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: provision-workspace
step.action: Create workspace + integration token; create Projects / Tasks / Sprints DBs.

step.name: define-tasks-schema
step.action: Add ≤15 properties: Title, Status (status type), Priority, Assignee, Project (relation), Sprint (relation), Estimate, Due, Tags, Blocked-By (self-relation).

step.name: wire-rollups
step.action: Add rollups on Projects: task count, completed count, estimate sum.

step.name: create-views
step.action: Create 4 views: Board / Table / Timeline / Calendar.

step.name: native-automations
step.action: Configure native automations: completion-date on Done, notify on Urgent, default Status=Backlog on create.

step.name: external-automations
step.action: Wire n8n flows: daily standup digest, sprint closure metrics.
